2606.21384.title: EnTrust: Modeling Inter-Modal Conflict for Trustworthy Multimodal Medical Image Analysis
2606.21384.paper_summary: Multimodal medical imaging fuses complementary anatomical and functional information, yet modalities frequently disagree in pathologically heterogeneous regions. Current segmentation models handle this in one of two inadequate ways: deterministic fusion that averages away disagreement, or post-hoc uncertainty estimation decoupled from the fusion process that produces it. Both obscure the clinically critical question: why is this prediction unreliable? We present EnTrust, a framework that treats inter-modal conflict as the primary source of predictive uncertainty. Our EnFuse module decomposes multimodal features into three disentangled components: shared anatomical consensus (F_c), modality-specific cues (F_{u,m}), and spatially localized conflict signals (F_{cf}), with independence enforced via a cross-covariance objective. This structured decomposition conditions SegDiff, a diffusion-based generative segmentation model whose sampled hypotheses diverge specifically in regions of modal disagreement. TrustMap then translates this hypothesis divergence into calibrated, pixel-wise uncertainty using ensemble entropy, conflict-guided perturbation probing, and a learned calibration head, enabling clinicians to understand not only where predictions are uncertain, but why. Across four benchmarks spanning brain, cardiac, lesion, and oncology domains, EnTrust achieves state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy while reducing calibration error by 40% compared to the strongest baseline. Notably, it outperforms 5x deep ensembles using a single model at roughly half the memory footprint. Code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/EnTrust.git.
2606.21384.paper_summary_zh: 多模態醫學影像融合了互補的解剖和功能信息，但在病理異質性區域，模態之間經常存在不一致。目前的分割模型以兩種不充分的方式處理這一問題：確定性融合通過平均消除不一致，或與生成過程解耦的事後不確定性估計。這兩者都掩蓋了臨床上關鍵的問題：為什麼這個預測不可靠？我們提出了 EnTrust，一個將模態間衝突視為預測不確定性主要來源的框架。我們的 EnFuse 模塊將多模態特徵分解為三個獨立的組件：共享的解剖共識 (F_c)、模態特定的線索 (F_{u,m}) 和空間定位的衝突信號 (F_{cf})，並通過交叉協方差目標強制獨立性。這一結構化分解為 SegDiff 提供了條件，SegDiff 是一個基於擴散的生成分割模型，其樣本假設在模態不一致的區域特別發散。然後，TrustMap 將這一假設的發散轉化為經過校準的逐像素不確定性，使用集成熵、衝突引導的擾動探測和學習的校準頭，使臨床醫生不僅能理解預測在哪裡不確定，還能理解為什麼不確定。在涵蓋大腦、心臟、病變和肿瘤學領域的四個基準測試中，EnTrust 實現了最先進的分割準確性，同時將校準誤差減少了 40%，相比於最強的基準值得到的結果。值得注意的是，它在大約一半的內存占用下，使用單一模型超越了 5 倍的深度集成。代碼和檢查點可在 https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/EnTrust.git 獲得。
2606.21384.author: Dwarikanath Mahapatra et.al.
2606.21384.authors: Dwarikanath Mahapatra, Abhijit Das, Behzad Bozorgtabar, Zongyuan Ge, Sudipta Roy, Deepak Nayak, Mauricio Reyes, Imran Razzak
